patch.insert_text: ; old metoprolol 50 mg discontinued as an outdated duplicate dose
added_claims: Old metoprolol 50 mg was discontinued as a duplicate/outdated dose

reasons: Evidence 'the old fifty-milligram metoprolol are off the list' supports discontinuation of the outdated 50 mg dose; framing as a duplicate is reasonable given the active metoprolol succinate ER 100 mg entry.
Note previously documented removing duplicate simvastatin but not the old metoprolol dose, so this adds new information.
Medication reconciliation detail belongs in the Assessment and Plan (fits the metoprolol/hypertension medication context).
